assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 reads the Last-Updated timestamp from the security-matrix.md HTML comment and parses the ISO 8601 value
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 14-15 show 'Last-Updated timestamp: 2026-05-01T10:00:00Z' parsed for stream 2.1.x, and lines 28-29 show the same for stream 2.2.x. The ISO 8601 value is explicitly extracted and used for age computation.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 detects that the matrix is older than the 14-day default threshold and displays a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 16: 'Age: 82 days (threshold: 14 days)' and line 17: 'Status: STALE'. Lines 19-26 display the staleness warning for stream 2.1.x. Lines 33-40 display the same for stream 2.2.x.

assertion_results.text: The staleness warning includes the stream name, the last-updated date, and the number of days since the last update
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 19-20: 'Security matrix for stream **2.1.x** was last updated on 2026-05-01 (82 days ago).' Contains stream name (2.1.x), last-updated date (2026-05-01), and days since update (82 days ago). Same pattern repeated for stream 2.2.x at lines 34-35.

assertion_results.text: The warning presents three options: refresh now (re-run setup Step 10.6), proceed anyway, or stop
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 22-24: '1. **Refresh now** -- re-run matrix population (setup Step 10.6) for this stream', '2. **Proceed anyway** -- continue triage with the current matrix', '3. **Stop** -- halt triage so I can investigate'. All three options are present with the correct descriptions.

assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 runs before Step 0.5 (JIRA Access Initialization) — no Jira operations are attempted before the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md is titled 'Step 0.3 -- Matrix Staleness Check' (step number 0.3 < 0.5). Lines 45-47: 'Awaiting user choice before proceeding with triage. If the user chooses Refresh now... If the user chooses Proceed anyway, triage will continue.' The only output file is the staleness check, and no Jira operations appear anywhere in the output, confirming no Jira access was initiated before or during this step.
